SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex

Class StrategyConfig

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.StrategyConfig
public class StrategyConfig extends Object
Root configuration for complex trading strategies. Deserialized from the JSON stored in AlgoStrategy.strategyConfig. All nested config objects use @Valid to cascade Jakarta Bean Validation through the entire tree.
